mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification_queue WHERE status = 'QUEUED' AND (terminal IS NULL OR terminal = false) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_queue (user_id, channel, recipient, subject, body, status, retry_count, reference_type, reference_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{channel}, #{recipient}, #{subject}, #{body}, #{status}, 0, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_queue SET status = #{status}, processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification_queue SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND read_at IS NULL
UPDATE notification_queue SET archived = true WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification_queue SET terminal = true, status = 'FAILED' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification_queue SET retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
